description: Product Description Bring Color To Your Christmas! Beautiful ceramic winter themed mugs to warm up with this winter! Made of ceramic with handpainted designs, this coffee mug is sure to please. Perfect size, suitable for microwave and dishwasher. Perfect for coffee, tea, hot chocolat, cocoa and cereal. Perfect gift for Woman, Man friends, Wife, Husband, partner and your Family. Bring in the holiday cheer with this adorable Santa Claus coffee mugs. The important thing is that it can decorate your Christmas. This coffee mugs will meet any of your needs!
